task_completion.description: Launch the second OpenICE Supervisor instance and redirect its output to node_b.log
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of '/home/ga/openice/launch_supervisor.sh' with output redirected to '/home/ga/Desktop/node_b.log' (e.g., using '>'), or the 'node_b.log' file visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Create a simulated Capnometer in the second instance (Node B)
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenICE Supervisor GUI window (representing Node B) showing a simulated 'Capnometer' selected, configured, or running.

task_completion.description: Create a simulated Infusion Pump in the primary instance (Node A)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A separate OpenICE Supervisor GUI window (representing Node A) showing a simulated 'Infusion Pump' selected, configured, or running.

task_completion.description: Use the 'Vital Signs' app in Node A to view the remote data from Node B
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vital Signs' application open within the OpenICE GUI of Node A, actively displaying data or waveforms originating from the remote Capnometer.

task_completion.description: Write a report confirming bidirectional discovery to interop_report.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation of '/home/ga/Desktop/interop_report.txt' with text explicitly confirming that bidirectional DDS discovery was successful.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenICE GUI to create the simulated devices
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the graphical user interface of OpenICE being used to select and start the simulated devices, rather than just terminal commands mocking the process.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual 'Vital Signs' app within OpenICE
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenICE Vital Signs graphical interface must be visible displaying the data, rather than the agent just reading log files or writing a script to parse data.

integrity.description: The report file contains genuine confirmation of the test rather than a copy-paste of the prompt
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inside 'interop_report.txt' should be a coherent confirmation statement written by the agent based on its observation, not just a verbatim copy of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Node A (primary instance) log is expected at /home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log. Node B (second instance) log must be at /home/ga/Desktop/node_b.log. The report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/interop_report.txt. Node A must run a simulated 'Infusion Pump' and Node B must run a simulated 'Capnometer'. Both are officially supported simulated devices in OpenICE.
